summary: Iteration 20: Testing Clinical Case Album Generator - Photo upload/delete/list endpoints and PDF album generation. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED (100%). All photo management APIs verified including upload, delete, list, serve, and PDF generation. Frontend: CasePhotoAlbum component renders correctly with 4 collapsible phases, photo counts, progress bars, and Generate Album button.
critical_code_review_comments: PHOTO_STEPS correctly defined with 44 total steps across 4 phases (14+12+7+11)
ALBUM_CAPTIONS dictionary provides figure captions for PDF generation
Photo upload validates step_id against PHOTO_STEPS definitions
Photo deletion properly removes both DB record and file from disk
PDF generation uses FPDF with proper unicode sanitization (_safe function)
io module correctly imported at line 6 for PDF buffer creation
CasePhotoAlbum component properly handles expand/collapse state
Upload button correctly shows only for student owners
seed_data_creation: Procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 has 1 photo uploaded to step p1_extraoral_rest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clinical Case Album feature fully tested. Backend API endpoints working correctly. Frontend CasePhotoAlbum component renders with 4 phases, photo steps with status indicators, and Generate Album PDF button. Student credentials verified for photo upload access.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/photo-steps: PASS - Returns all 44 photo step definitions across 4 phases
backend_endpoints.GET /api/photo-steps/{phase}: PASS - Returns phase-specific steps (Phase 1=14, Phase 2=12, Phase 3=7, Phase 4=11)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}/photos: PASS - Returns photos grouped by step with progress info
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/procedures/{id}/photos/{step: PASS - Delete photo removes DB record and file
backend_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/generate-album: PASS - Generate PDF album with embedded photos

frontend_components.CasePhotoAlbum_renders: PASS - Component visible on procedure detail page
frontend_components.4_collapsible_phases: PASS - Phase 1, 2, 3, 4 all visible and expandable
frontend_components.progress_bars: PASS - Visual progress indicator per phase
frontend_components.step_status_indicators: PASS - Green checkmark for completed, empty circle for pending
frontend_components.photo_count_badges: PASS - Badge shows number of photos per step
frontend_components.generate_album_button: PASS - Button visible when photos exist

photo_step_coverage.phase_3_second_stage: 7 steps - Pre-operative (1), Intra-operative (2), Follow-up (1), Impression (2), Prosthetic (1)

permission_checks.student_upload: PASS - Students can upload photos to their procedures
permission_checks.student_delete: PASS - Students can delete their own photos
permission_checks.non_student_delete_denied: PASS - Implant incharge cannot delete student photos (403)
